name: Chili Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop all ingredients finely.
2. Cook for about 3 hours until thickens.
- Add a small amount of cornstarch mixed with water at the very end to thicken and smooth the sauce.
3. Sterilize pint or quart jars and fill to within 1 inch of the top.
4. Screw on lids tightly.
- This chili sauce is delicious in spaghetti, but it's also wonderful when poured over browned Swiss steak and simmered.
- (Used in our family for years, passed down from my mom around 1957.)
